# UPchieve Changelog, week of Jul 14 to 19, 2026

*Generated by Claude from merge-request and commit activity. Details may be inaccurate; check the linked MR or ask the author.*

Last deploys: high-line Jul 16, subway Jul 17. These deploys carried the backlog that last week's digest had as merged or approved, so much of what follows is last week's pipeline reaching production.

**Status key:** 🚀 Launched (live to everyone) | 🧪 Experimental (in production, behind a feature flag) | 🎁 Merged (ships next deploy) | ✅ Approved (reviewed, not yet merged) | 👀 In review (needs review)

---

## Student → Volunteer (S2V)

Lets a student become a volunteer coach on the same account, switching modes instead of creating a second one, so they can earn verified volunteer service hours.

- **Volunteer hours page:** 🚀 the `/hour-calculator` route renamed, with a redirect kept for now ([high-line !1779](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1779)); 🎁 the impact summary pulled into its own component ([high-line !1783](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1783)); 🎁 the hours calculator pulled into its own component ([high-line !1780](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1780)); ✅ the impact summary now shown on the page ([high-line !1784](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1784)). *sammy nave*
- 🎁 **Emit one backend event when the volunteer role is added.** The several S2V entry points each fired their own event; they now fold into a single PostHog action, recorded server-side at the moment the role is added to the account. ([subway !2812](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2812)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🎁 **Removed the `/add-volunteer-role` route and its `volunteer-ask-for-college-interest` flag.** It was an early path that added the volunteer role to students the flag targeted; the flag had been switched off. ([high-line !1782](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1782)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 👀 **First-time coaches get a "Building your coach experience" transition screen.** The first time a student adds volunteer mode, a short celebratory screen plays before the volunteer dashboard, reinforcing that the account now has two modes to toggle between. Later switches keep using the existing toggle. ([high-line !1777](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1777)) *Jamie Kasulis*

## API response contracts

A typed, tested contract for every API route's response.

- 🚀 **Moderation api-public mappers and contracts.** ([subway !2623](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2623)) *Trey Stevens*
- 🎁 **NTHS api-public mappers and contracts.** ([subway !2624](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2624)) *Trey Stevens*
- 👀 **17 more open MRs** covering the remaining domains: sessions, subjects, students, teachers, users, volunteers, surveys, training, tutor-bot, auth, eligibility, contact, feature flags, moderation, and the api-public routes. Stacked, each easiest to review commit by commit. *Trey Stevens*

## End-to-end test suite

A browser test suite that drives high-line against a real subway, plus the work to make it run in CI.

- 🚀 **Core flows covered.** Sessions, login, volunteer signup and training, notifications, availability, and student signup. ([high-line !1747](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1747), [high-line !1755](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1755), [high-line !1766](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1766), [high-line !1754](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1754), [high-line !1757](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1757), [high-line !1763](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1763), [high-line !1764](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1764), [high-line !1740](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1740)) *sammy nave, Jamie Kasulis*
- 🚀 **Harness and CI setup.** subway run logs written to a file, zombie processes from local runs cleaned up, the chat test waits for the socket before typing, the suite runs under pnpm, recaptcha is skipped in the E2E environment, and `isE2eEnvironment` now covers CI. ([high-line !1751](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1751), [high-line !1744](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1744), [high-line !1768](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1768), [high-line !1734](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1734), [high-line !1738](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1738), [high-line !1749](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1749), [high-line !1745](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1745), [high-line !1769](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1769), [subway !2783](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2783)) *sammy nave, Jamie Kasulis*
- 🚀 **README and setup cleanup.** ([high-line !1739](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1739), [high-line !1771](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1771), [high-line !1774](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1774)) *sammy nave, Jamie Kasulis*

## TypeScript conversion

Moving high-line from JavaScript to TypeScript.

- 🚀 **The remaining high-line services converted to TypeScript.** ([high-line !1732](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1732)) *Jamie Kasulis*

## Postgres read replica

A replica of the production database, so dev, testing, and debugging run against realistic data, and as the start of an analytics environment.

- 🚀 **Publisher setup** on the primary. ([subway !2786](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2786)) *Alex Lindsay*
- ✅ **Subscriber setup, a read-only `upchieve`-schema role, and a post-migration publication-maintenance script** remain approved and waiting to merge. ([subway !2804](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2804), [subway !2785](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2785), [subway !2787](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2787)) *Alex Lindsay*

---

## Quick wins, fixes, chores, and other small things

- 🚀 **Teacher views cleanup:** routing rebuilt on nested routes ([high-line !1724](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1724)); `router.js` converted to `router.ts` ([high-line !1716](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1716)); breadcrumbs moved to the parent view ([high-line !1725](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1725)); non-teachers guarded out of teacher routes ([high-line !1717](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1717)); class-details tab selection fixed ([high-line !1728](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1728)); header icon and title made consistent ([high-line !1726](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1726)). *Alex Lindsay*
- 🚀 **Sign-in improvements:** a show/hide toggle on the password field, login failures announced in an accessible alert instead of failing quietly, and a placeholder plus clearer invalid-state styling on the password input. ([high-line !1742](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1742)) *Liseidy Bueno*
- **Surveys without wired-up response choices:** 🚀 a survey with no linked subject falls back to the default post-session survey instead of failing to load ([subway !2806](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2806)); 👀 free-response questions return without a placeholder response choice ([subway !2815](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2815)); 👀 free-response submissions save without choice IDs ([subway !2814](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2814)); 👀 the front end supports choice-less free-response questions ([high-line !1787](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1787)); 👀 a topic name can be substituted into question text ([subway !2816](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2816)). *Trey Stevens*
- 🚀 **Record why a session join fails.** A `reason` is now saved whenever a join attempt fails, giving the team a direct read on how often each failure happens. ([subway !2808](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2808), [subway !2809](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2809)) *sammy nave*
- **Coach occupation on the user profile:** ✅ PostHog events for the new field ([high-line !1786](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1786)); 👀 the occupation field added to the profile in read and edit modes ([high-line !1781](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1781)); 👀 the backend to update occupation from the profile ([subway !2811](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2811)); 🎁 a primary key on the `volunteer_occupations` table so its row deletes replicate ([subway !2813](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2813)). *Kasozi Wilson*
- ✅ **Track when a moderation infraction is quarantined.** A `quarantined_on` column is added to moderation infractions, part of the PhotoDNA image-screening work. ([subway !2807](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2807)) *Liseidy Bueno*
- 🚀 **Consolidate end-session logic.** End-session calls now route through `endAndExitSession`, cutting duplicate exit paths; surfaced during the [#636](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/636) socket-join investigation. ([high-line !1733](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1733)) *sammy nave*
- 🚀 **Highlight the currently open subject in the progress report sidebar** was merged and then reverted, so nothing changes for now. ([high-line !1696](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1696), reverted in [high-line !1767](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1767)) *Kasozi Wilson*

### Fixes

- 🚀 **Reroute subject aliases to the quizzes they actually use.** Locked AP subjects with a shared quiz were dead ends: the session went unresponsive with no quiz prompt. It now resolves and loads the quiz the subject actually uses. 🐛 [#680](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/680) ([subway !2773](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2773), [subway !2774](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2774); [high-line !1729](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1729), [high-line !1730](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1730), [high-line !1731](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1731)) *Chris*
- 🚀 **Give the volunteer background form's "How did you hear about us?" question a dropdown, and make it required.** It had been asking with nothing to answer it with. 🐛 [#667](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/667) ([high-line !1773](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1773)) *Kasozi Wilson*
- 🚀 **Surface the real reason a session pickup failed.** It showed a generic error instead of the failure reason, because network errors were returned as plain objects and lost the server's message; they are now thrown as real errors, so the message reaches the user. 🐛 [#644](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/644) ([high-line !1719](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1719)) *Trey Stevens*
- 🚀 **Require grade and school in student signup.** Elementary students could otherwise sign up by choosing "Other" as their grade. 🐛 [#671](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/issues/-/work_items/671) ([high-line !1723](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1723)) *sammy nave*
- 🚀 **Enforced bans on joining sessions.** The ban states that block joining a session were tightened ([subway !2772](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2772)), and shadow-banned coaches can no longer pick up sessions or receive session notifications ([high-line !1775](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1775)). *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🚀 **Prebundle Vuetify deep imports.** They were causing a flaky unit-test CI job. ([high-line !1762](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1762)) *Chris*
- 🚀 **Remove a stale `refresh_materialized_views` reference.** ([high-line !1736](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1736)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🚀 **Trace the process-session-ended job.** It had no visibility into where its time went. ([subway !2788](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2788)) *Kasozi Wilson*
- 🚀 **Block DML in migrations.** Migrations could previously contain data-manipulation statements; now they cannot. ([subway !2784](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2784)) *Alex Lindsay*
- ✅ **Filter cached students instead of refetching on every teacher filter change.** The teacher student-details tab re-ran the full students-and-session-details fetch on each filter change; it now fetches once on load and filters a cached, computed view. ([high-line !1778](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1778)) *Alex Lindsay*
- 👀 **Stop dropping student completion data.** A shared `makeSomeOptional` helper strips null fields, so a later `submitted_at === null` check silently failed: the field was now undefined, and undefined is not null. The comparison was corrected and consolidated into one place. ([high-line !1785](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1785)) *Alex Lindsay*

### Chores

- 🚀 **Removed dead code from the coach invitation test.** ([subway !2805](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2805), [high-line !1776](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/application/high-line/-/merge_requests/1776)) *Jamie Kasulis*
- 🚀 **Regenerated the local DB schema and seed dump.** ([subway !2810](https://gitlab.com/upchieve/subway/-/merge_requests/2810)) *Liseidy Bueno*
